body:
Deploy preview for *instantsearchjs* ready!

Built with commit 91efb7df93a41ffbf8d497d2638d1292297a2e67

https://deploy-preview-3400--instantsearchjs.netlify.com

Deploy preview for *instantsearchjs* ready!

Built with commit 1819775ce609808a74157ca2da14755d3fab9782

https://deploy-preview-3400--instantsearchjs.netlify.com

The remaining issue that I'm aware of is the styling of [the storybook](https://deploy-preview-3400--instantsearchjs.netlify.com/stories):

https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/blob/b23f7f58593a1e69a32492f0454c61b5f85d0640/.storybook/config.js#L3

It's ignored when building the storybook, but not during development. I'm not sure why yet.
To avoid the issue with the CSS file you can use the `--static-dir` option with the `preview-head`.
Thank you @samouss – the styles are fixed in production.
What is the diff in the output?
